'''zhashuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kaboom|kaboom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kaboom|kaboom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhashuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæshijith|zhæshijith]] || [[word:zhæshijij|zhæshijij]] || [[word:zhæshijish|zhæshijish]] || [[word:zhæshiji|zhæshiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhashushujuth|zhashushujuth]] || [[word:zhashushujuj|zhashushujuj]] || [[word:zhashushujush|zhashushujush]] || [[word:zhashushuju|zhashushuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhashujuth|zhashujuth]] || [[word:zhashujuj|zhashujuj]] || [[word:zhashujush|zhashujush]] || [[word:zhashuju|zhashuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhashufjuth|zhashufjuth]] || [[word:zhashufjuj|zhashufjuj]] || [[word:zhashufjush|zhashufjush]] || [[word:zhashufjuf|zhashufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhashujuthu|zhashujuthu]] || [[word:zhashujuju|zhashujuju]] || [[word:zhashujushu|zhashujushu]] || [[word:zhashujuku|zhashujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhashujuth|zhashujuth]] || [[word:zhashujuj|zhashujuj]] || [[word:zhashujush|zhashujush]] || [[word:zhashuju|zhashuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhashujuthul|zhashujuthul]] || [[word:zhashujujul|zhashujujul]] || [[word:zhashujushul|zhashujushul]] || [[word:zhashujukul|zhashujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhashujuthuthu|zhashujuthuthu]] || [[word:zhashujujuju|zhashujujuju]] || [[word:zhashujushushu|zhashujushushu]] || [[word:zhashujuku|zhashujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhashujuthun|zhashujuthun]] || [[word:zhashujujun|zhashujujun]] || [[word:zhashujushun|zhashujushun]] || [[word:zhashujukun|zhashujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhashujuthuoro|zhashujuthuoro]] || [[word:zhashujujuoro|zhashujujuoro]] || [[word:zhashujushuoro|zhashujushuoro]] || [[word:zhashujukuoro|zhashujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
